---
title: "Publications"
---

## Academic profiles

To view citation metrics and publication links, visit the profiles below:

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-Profile-0077b5?logo=linkedin&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vahhab-piranfar/)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Google_Scholar-Citations:_530-blue?logo=google-scholar&style=for-the-badge)](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=o2GdH2oAAAAJ&hl=en)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/ORCID-0000_0002_0123_4567-green?logo=orcid&style=for-the-badge)](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3653-5739)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/ResearchGate-Profile-00ccbb?logo=researchgate&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Vahhab-Piranfar)

## Selected publications

### Featured articles

1. **Piranfar V.** Comparative modeling of antibiotic resistance, tolerance, and persistence in *Mycobacterium tuberculosis* and *Staphylococcus aureus*. *bioRxiv*. 2025.
2. **Masoumi Zavaryani S, et al.** Identification of *Enterococcus faecalis* and *E. faecium* pathogens in Tehran hospital clinical samples. *Pars Journal of Medical Sciences*. 2022.
3. **Karpians G, Piranfar V, et al.** Interleukin 6 (IL-6) in patients with COVID-19 infection: a cross-sectional study. *JOGCR*. 2022.
4. **Karpians G, Piranfar V, et al.** Leukocyte parameters, CRP, and ferritin in Iranian patients with COVID-19 infection. *IJMM*. 2021.
5. **Zamani MM, et al.** Protective effect of selenium and vitamin C on liver and kidney toxicity of cadmium. *Iranian Journal of Pathology*. 2021.
6. **Danesh F, GhaviDel S, Piranfar V.** Coronavirus: discovering the structure of global knowledge. *JAMBS*. 2020.
7. **Mahboobi M, et al.** Genetic diversity of the ctxB gene among strains of *Vibrio cholerae*. *Iranian Journal of Pathology*. 2020.
8. **Masoumi Zavaryani S, et al.** Resistance pattern in clinical *Enterococcus* isolates. *Iranian Journal of Pathology*. 2020.
9. **Sajjadi N, et al.** Gene polymorphism and genetic predisposition of HPV in patients with cervical cancer. *Mod Med Lab J*. 2017.
10. **Ramandi M, et al.** Dose-response effects of CM11 as a short cationic antimicrobial peptide. *Current Chemical Biology*. 2017.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Additional research (articles 11–33)

11. **Mohseni K, et al.** Evaluation of ELISA, PCR, and serum agglutination tests for diagnosis of *Brucella*. *Iranian Journal of Pathology*. 2017.
12. **Jazi FM, et al.** Real-time PCR and HRM analysis for detection of pathogenic species of *Brucella*. *LaboratoriumsMedizin*. 2017.
13. **Sajjadi N, Piranfar V, et al.** Identification of streptomycin resistance genes among *Enterococcus* spp. *IJMM*. 2017.
14. **Masoumi Zavaryani S, et al.** Evaluation of antimicrobial susceptibility in 2016. *Journal of Jahrom University of Medical Sciences*. 2016.
15. **Mirnejad R, et al.** Identification of aminoglycoside resistance genes by triplex PCR in *Enterococcus* spp. *Infez Med*. 2016.
16. **Khazaei Z, et al.** Microarray-based long oligonucleotide probe designed for *Brucella* spp. detection. *Electronic Physician*. 2016.
17. **Mohammad Hasani S, et al.** Specific detection of *Brucella* by PCR-ELISA and multiplex PCR. *Iranian Journal of Pathology*. 2016.
18. **Irajian GR, et al.** Species-specific PCR for diagnosis of *Brucella* strains. *Iranian Journal of Pathology*. 2016.
19. **Masoumi Zavaryani S, et al.** Phenotypic and genotypic methods for *E. faecalis*. *JJMUS*. 2016.
20. **Akbarzadeh E, et al.** Simultaneous identification of pathogenic *Brucella* species by multiplex PCR. *SJKU*. 2015.
21. **Piranfar V, et al.** Detection and discrimination of two *Brucella* species by multiplex real-time PCR and HRM. *IJBMS*. 2015.
22. **Kachuei R, et al.** PCR-RFLP patterns for the differentiation of *Fusarium* species. *Current Medical Mycology*. 2015.
23. **Khataminejad MR, et al.** Antimicrobial effect of imipenem-functionalized Fe2O3 nanoparticles on *P. aeruginosa*. *IJB*. 2015.
24. **Erfani M, et al.** Incidence and antibiotic susceptibility pattern of *Staphylococcus* spp. in UTI. *CRB*. 2015.
25. **Piranfar V, et al.** Incidence and antibiotic susceptibility pattern of bacterial pathogens causing UTI. *IJEP*. 2014.
26. **Rasoulinezhad F, et al.** Effect of selective oropharyngeal decontamination on colonization. *IJMM*. 2014.
27. **Mirnejad R, et al.** Antimicrobial effect of *Lactobacillus casei* against MDR *Shigella*. *IRCMJ*. 2013.
28. **Mirnejad R, et al.** Detection of *Brucella abortus* and *Brucella melitensis* from human blood samples. *ZJRMS*. 2013.
29. **Mirnejad R, Piranfar V, et al.** A duplex PCR for rapid and simultaneous detection of *Brucella* spp. *APJTM*. 2013.
30. **Mirnejad R, et al.** Molecular typing of *Brucella melitensis* and *B. abortus* using PCR-RFLP. *JJM*. 2013.
31. **Mirnejad R, et al.** Synergistic effect of silver nanoparticles with streptomycin on *Brucella abortus*. *JSUMS*. 2013.
32. **Piranfar V, et al.** Antimicrobial nature of *Lactobacillus casei* against MDR *Shigella*. *IJMS*. 2012.
33. **Piranfar V.** D3–D5 dopamine receptor expression in paranoid schizophrenia patients. *JICS*. 2009.
:::

### Published books

- **Metal Nanoparticles in Microbiology** [Persian]. ISBN: 8-228-504-964-978.
